name: MiruShin
subtitle: New way to watch and discover media.
description: Official AltStore / SideStore / Feather / LiveContainer source for MiruShin - a cross-platform anime streaming and player app.

apps.name: MiruShin
apps.subtitle: New way to watch and discover media.
apps.localizedDescription:
MiruShin takes the familiar feel of AnimeShin and pushes it further with a cleaner Flutter architecture, real Sora module support, cross-platform playback, and deeper AniList profile flows. It can switch between TMDB-driven discovery and AniList-driven catalog views, then carry that context into your library, watch flow, and player.

MiruShin is a media player and interface layer. It does not host or provide any content, and ships no built-in Sora modules.

versions.localizedDescription:
MiruShin continues to evolve as a modern and comfortable way to watch and discover media, with each update focused on making the experience smoother, cleaner, and more enjoyable across the app. ## What's New - Added Clear All and Apply buttons to the source filter.

Previous Changelog

 ### v1.7.0 - Added a new Sources page. You can open it from the Sources button on the Addons page. - You can now add your own catalog by pasting a catalog URL, for example example.com/modules.json. - You can open a source, browse its addons, and install them into your library with one tap. - Addons that are already installed are now clearly marked. - Added search by addon name, author, language, and type. - Added filters for multiple languages and types at the same time, for example Russian + English or anime + movies. - Added a Downloadable only filter. - You can now refresh, rename, copy the URL, or remove a source. - Removing a source will not remove your installed addons. ### v1.6.4 - Added support for adding addons by addon ID. ### v1.6.3 - TMDB season picker now shows the real number of seasons from the addon. - Fixed watch progress not tracking for TMDB episodes in the local library, including across auto-next season changes. ### v1.6.2 - Fixed auto-next episode and watch progress for auto-played episodes. - Previously, when an episode started automatically, watch progress was not saved and the next episode did not play correctly. - Now every episode saves progress, marks itself as watched at 85%, and reliably continues to the next episode. - Fixed the update download button sometimes not working. ### v1.6.1 - Fixed auto-progress and auto-next reliability issues. ### v1.6.0 - Android TV support with Leanback launcher/banner, TV-aware navigation, focus rings, and d-pad-friendly cards. - Player remote fixes: OK play/pause, paused UI focus navigation, Settings/Quality/Episodes/Subtitles reachable by d-pad, sliders no longer trap focus, Back hides chrome first. - Android TV WebView cursor improvements: smaller/smoother cursor, native tap fallback, better keyboard/textbox handling, and cursor support for YouTube trailers. - AniList editor improvements from TV: hold OK on media cards opens entry edit actions where supported. - Library/search/addon/settings text fields improved for d-pad escape. - Playback fixes including seek/d-pad fixes, PiP handling fixes, iOS PiP fix, and player back-button fixes. - AniList and Shikimori metadata/library fixes. ### v1.5.0 - Improved auto-next episode, mark as watched, and AniList sync. - Fixed progress on finished streams, even when the stream jumps back to 0:00. - Fixed player controls and mouse cursor not hiding after auto-next. - Fixed buffering spinner sometimes staying visible after playback resumes. - AniList now marks anime as Completed when you finish the last known episode. - Fixed Trailer button, now it appears correctly on all devices. - Moved Auto AniList progress setting, now it only shows in the AniList catalog. - Fixed settings not saving after app restart. - Poster card style and compact mode are now remembered. ### v1.4.4 - Added a built-in TMDB key, so MiruShin works out of the box. - TMDB metadata now loads on first launch without setup. - Added a Use custom API key option in Settings -> API Connections. - You can still use your own TMDB Read Access Token if needed. - TMDB metadata is now enabled by default. ### v1.4.3 - Improved video playback reliability. - Fixed some streams not playing when proxy playback failed. - The player now automatically tries another playback method when needed. ### v1.4.2 - Episodes in the TMDB Catalog are now sorted by season. ### v1.4.1 - Fixed WebView support on Windows. YouTube trailers now play correctly on Windows. ### v1.4.0 - Added trailer support for AniList and TMDB catalogs. The trailer button is shown only when a trailer is available. ### v1.3.8 - Improved the anime and manga detail pages with a cleaner and more polished layout. - Improved the Edit button design and placement. - AniList cards now always open the Edit page in AniList mode. - Fixed Auto-Next so it now keeps the server selected inside the player. The next episode will resolve using the chosen server instead of falling back to the old or default one. - Fixed an Auto-Next issue where the app could return to the Choose Episode page instead of continuing playback. ### v1.3.7 - Added pinch-out gesture support in the player to switch to Zoom mode. - Added pinch-in gesture support to switch back to Normal mode. - Improved the left sidebar behavior, so it now switches states earlier and feels more responsive. - Reduced the height of the top and bottom black fog effects in the player UI for a cleaner viewing experience. - Fixed player initialization: the video now repaints immediately instead of waiting for mouse movement to trigger a rebuild. ### v1.3.6 - Added a custom accent color picker. - Removed unused options from Settings for a cleaner experience. ### v1.3.5 - Added a floating popup notification for new app updates. - Improved mobile auto-next playback. The next episode now opens immediately in fullscreen player mode for a smoother watching experience. - Updated Discord Rich Presence: the application name now appears as **MiruShin**. - Fixed slow Choose Episode loading for custom/addon sources. - Episodes from the addon now appear first, using the addon’s own episode name and poster when available. - AniList/AniZip episode titles and thumbnails now load lazily only after the episode list is already shown. - Improved support for custom Sora episode formats, including grouped episode lists and chapter-style APIs. - Reduced stale search work when switching from Find Sources to Choose Episode. - Auto-next now fetches the latest addon episode list instead of relying on old cached episode data. ### v1.3.4 - Added animated hover backgrounds for Windows PiP buttons, making the controls feel smoother and more responsive. ### v1.3.3 - Smarter Escape key in the player. - Infinite scroll on AniList Favourites. ### v1.3.2 - Improved Picture-in-Picture support on Windows for a smoother and more native-like experience. - Fixed the missing app icon in the Linux .deb package. ### v1.3.1 - Fixed the Linux crash when opening an episode, video playback works again. - Added a `.deb` package for Debian/Ubuntu (AppImage and tar.gz still available). - More stable Linux playback across releases. ### v1.3.0 - Added a second player engine for improved playback stability. - Added PiP-style mini player support for Windows and Linux. - Added ARB localization support for English, Russian, and Japanese. - Added a local HLS proxy for the MPV player engine. ### v1.2.2 - Added startup page selection in Settings. - Added skip-marker source selection in Player Settings. - Improved iOS PiP exit handling so the player restores correctly. - Fixed AniList sync for the Favorite heart button. - Changed the default catalog mode to AniList. ### v1.2.0 - Added support for custom headers for subtitle tracks and network requests. - Fixed the AniList favorites list and added a Load More button. - Added a Windows installer for easier installation. ### v1.1.1 - Updated the player loading indicator to use a cleaner white circular spinner. - Added timeline preview on the player progress slider. - Fixed the Android splash screen logo display. ### v1.1.0 - Added airing anime notifications for supported platforms. - Added favorites support for anime, manga, and edit pages. - Added AniList status badges on Board and Discovery posters. - Improved mobile double-tap seeking speed and feedback. - Changed swipe seeking to use 2-second steps. - Improved temporary speed badge position and styling. - Fixed iOS PiP close cleanup so the player overlay clears correctly. - Polished AniList edit dialog progress controls. - Improved anime and manga tags. - Added Edit action for Board and Discovery pages. ### v1.0.2 - Added Linux support. - Added a shortcut in Settings to open AniList settings. ### v1.0.1 - Hold Space or press and hold the screen to speed up video playback. - Improved Discord Rich Presence with better playback details. - Fixed auto-next episodes so the correct episode name appears in the player.
## iOS Install (AltStore Source) Add the MiruShin source to AltStore, SideStore, Feather, or LiveContainer to install the `.ipa` and get future updates. Or add the source manually by pasting this URL into your installer's **Sources -> Add** screen: ```text https://raw.githubusercontent.com/emp0ry/MiruShin/main/docs/source.json ``` ## Helpful Notes - MiruShin supports both TMDB and AniList catalog modes. - Sora-compatible modules appear as addons inside the app. - For information on how to get Sora addons, please join the [Sora Discord](https://discord.gg/XR3SrmUbpd) server. ## Important Notice MiruShin is a media player and interface layer. It does not host, provide, or distribute content. - Users are responsible for providing their own content. - Users must ensure they have legal rights to any content they access or use. - Users are responsible for complying with all applicable laws and respecting copyright and intellectual property rights. - MiruShin does not include Sora modules. - Third-party modules are the responsibility of their creators, not MiruShin or emp0ry. ## Links - Website: https://emp0ry.github.io/MiruShin/ - Repository: https://github.com/emp0ry/MiruShin - Privacy Policy: https://github.com/emp0ry/MiruShin/blob/main/PRIVACY_POLICY.md - Legal Notice: https://github.com/emp0ry/MiruShin/blob/main/LEGAL.md

apps.versionDescription:
MiruShin continues to evolve as a modern and comfortable way to watch and discover media, with each update focused on making the experience smoother, cleaner, and more enjoyable across the app. ## What's New - Added Clear All and Apply buttons to the source filter.

Previous Changelog

 ### v1.7.0 - Added a new Sources page. You can open it from the Sources button on the Addons page. - You can now add your own catalog by pasting a catalog URL, for example example.com/modules.json. - You can open a source, browse its addons, and install them into your library with one tap. - Addons that are already installed are now clearly marked. - Added search by addon name, author, language, and type. - Added filters for multiple languages and types at the same time, for example Russian + English or anime + movies. - Added a Downloadable only filter. - You can now refresh, rename, copy the URL, or remove a source. - Removing a source will not remove your installed addons. ### v1.6.4 - Added support for adding addons by addon ID. ### v1.6.3 - TMDB season picker now shows the real number of seasons from the addon. - Fixed watch progress not tracking for TMDB episodes in the local library, including across auto-next season changes. ### v1.6.2 - Fixed auto-next episode and watch progress for auto-played episodes. - Previously, when an episode started automatically, watch progress was not saved and the next episode did not play correctly. - Now every episode saves progress, marks itself as watched at 85%, and reliably continues to the next episode. - Fixed the update download button sometimes not working. ### v1.6.1 - Fixed auto-progress and auto-next reliability issues. ### v1.6.0 - Android TV support with Leanback launcher/banner, TV-aware navigation, focus rings, and d-pad-friendly cards. - Player remote fixes: OK play/pause, paused UI focus navigation, Settings/Quality/Episodes/Subtitles reachable by d-pad, sliders no longer trap focus, Back hides chrome first. - Android TV WebView cursor improvements: smaller/smoother cursor, native tap fallback, better keyboard/textbox handling, and cursor support for YouTube trailers. - AniList editor improvements from TV: hold OK on media cards opens entry edit actions where supported. - Library/search/addon/settings text fields improved for d-pad escape. - Playback fixes including seek/d-pad fixes, PiP handling fixes, iOS PiP fix, and player back-button fixes. - AniList and Shikimori metadata/library fixes. ### v1.5.0 - Improved auto-next episode, mark as watched, and AniList sync. - Fixed progress on finished streams, even when the stream jumps back to 0:00. - Fixed player controls and mouse cursor not hiding after auto-next. - Fixed buffering spinner sometimes staying visible after playback resumes. - AniList now marks anime as Completed when you finish the last known episode. - Fixed Trailer button, now it appears correctly on all devices. - Moved Auto AniList progress setting, now it only shows in the AniList catalog. - Fixed settings not saving after app restart. - Poster card style and compact mode are now remembered. ### v1.4.4 - Added a built-in TMDB key, so MiruShin works out of the box. - TMDB metadata now loads on first launch without setup. - Added a Use custom API key option in Settings -> API Connections. - You can still use your own TMDB Read Access Token if needed. - TMDB metadata is now enabled by default. ### v1.4.3 - Improved video playback reliability. - Fixed some streams not playing when proxy playback failed. - The player now automatically tries another playback method when needed. ### v1.4.2 - Episodes in the TMDB Catalog are now sorted by season. ### v1.4.1 - Fixed WebView support on Windows. YouTube trailers now play correctly on Windows. ### v1.4.0 - Added trailer support for AniList and TMDB catalogs. The trailer button is shown only when a trailer is available. ### v1.3.8 - Improved the anime and manga detail pages with a cleaner and more polished layout. - Improved the Edit button design and placement. - AniList cards now always open the Edit page in AniList mode. - Fixed Auto-Next so it now keeps the server selected inside the player. The next episode will resolve using the chosen server instead of falling back to the old or default one. - Fixed an Auto-Next issue where the app could return to the Choose Episode page instead of continuing playback. ### v1.3.7 - Added pinch-out gesture support in the player to switch to Zoom mode. - Added pinch-in gesture support to switch back to Normal mode. - Improved the left sidebar behavior, so it now switches states earlier and feels more responsive. - Reduced the height of the top and bottom black fog effects in the player UI for a cleaner viewing experience. - Fixed player initialization: the video now repaints immediately instead of waiting for mouse movement to trigger a rebuild. ### v1.3.6 - Added a custom accent color picker. - Removed unused options from Settings for a cleaner experience. ### v1.3.5 - Added a floating popup notification for new app updates. - Improved mobile auto-next playback. The next episode now opens immediately in fullscreen player mode for a smoother watching experience. - Updated Discord Rich Presence: the application name now appears as **MiruShin**. - Fixed slow Choose Episode loading for custom/addon sources. - Episodes from the addon now appear first, using the addon’s own episode name and poster when available. - AniList/AniZip episode titles and thumbnails now load lazily only after the episode list is already shown. - Improved support for custom Sora episode formats, including grouped episode lists and chapter-style APIs. - Reduced stale search work when switching from Find Sources to Choose Episode. - Auto-next now fetches the latest addon episode list instead of relying on old cached episode data. ### v1.3.4 - Added animated hover backgrounds for Windows PiP buttons, making the controls feel smoother and more responsive. ### v1.3.3 - Smarter Escape key in the player. - Infinite scroll on AniList Favourites. ### v1.3.2 - Improved Picture-in-Picture support on Windows for a smoother and more native-like experience. - Fixed the missing app icon in the Linux .deb package. ### v1.3.1 - Fixed the Linux crash when opening an episode, video playback works again. - Added a `.deb` package for Debian/Ubuntu (AppImage and tar.gz still available). - More stable Linux playback across releases. ### v1.3.0 - Added a second player engine for improved playback stability. - Added PiP-style mini player support for Windows and Linux. - Added ARB localization support for English, Russian, and Japanese. - Added a local HLS proxy for the MPV player engine. ### v1.2.2 - Added startup page selection in Settings. - Added skip-marker source selection in Player Settings. - Improved iOS PiP exit handling so the player restores correctly. - Fixed AniList sync for the Favorite heart button. - Changed the default catalog mode to AniList. ### v1.2.0 -
